transcript: Okay, next two. Pricey, Helen. Ready? Go! Got some catching up to do, Mark. God. Helen, easy. Go. Look at this. Go on. Go on, mate! Yes! Yes! We got Orsi, Danny Ready Go! Pricey, you have to go again You've only done it once Zara needs a partner Go on guys, keep it going Well done, all the way down Nice Zara You're up There you go Okay Ready 3, 2, 1, go Go on Zara We'll be right back.
